title: salix × subnuda
intro: Salix × subnuda is a hybrid willow plant, derived from the cross between the weeping willow (Salix babylonica) and the white willow (Salix alba). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its high salicin content, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × subnuda include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Salix × subnuda can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from arthritis to migraines.
